scenarios.name: baseline
scenarios.description: Current notebook settings and current jitter defaults.

scenarios.name: fullness_25
scenarios.description: Reduce notebook source cap to 25 to see whether fullness pressure shows up sooner.

scenarios.name: fresh_state
scenarios.description: Clear worker state before the run so the notebook is recreated fresh.

scenarios.name: reuse_state
scenarios.description: Reuse the shared worker state so notebook reuse can amortize setup.

scenarios.name: staggered_off
scenarios.description: Disable worker jitter to see how much access contention the stagger avoids.

scenarios.name: staggered_on
scenarios.description: Use the current worker jitter window to compare against staggered_off.

scenarios.name: rotation_75
scenarios.description: Raise the notebook source cap to 75 to see whether rotation itself is the limiter.
